title: misch origins, Omori
description: Close your eyes, you'll be here soon
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

heavily inspired/based on Omori

many textures/sound effects from Omori

if you are able and have the spare time, please play the game.

# about the pack
, choose to spawn as a Omori

, dont forget to download the resourcepack

, there are bright/heavy contrast overlays, be careful
, some overlays also display for players hit by your knife

, there will be jumpscares, though mild, the audio may be loud
, controlled by 'Player' audio in settings

![Omori Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64813c8ed2dd5633f017b9d9ff7a43b9c53b5686_0.webp)

![Omori GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f459af4f68354dafac9b554fd187a36d1f93b42.png)

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

, food items can be crafted by all players

, only 1 Omori per world please.
